books.title: Stalker
books.author: Lars Kepler
books.description: A chilling hunt where every move is watched. A psychological thriller about a killer who films victims before striking.
books.genre: Psychological thriller, Novel, Suspense, Fiction, Mystery

books.title: YOU
books.author: Caroline Kepnes
books.description: A dangerously obsessive love story in the digital age. A chilling thriller about Joe Goldberg, whose charm hides a dark fixation as he manipulates and stalks those he claims to love.
books.genre: Mystery Thriller, Suspense, Horror, Adult, Crime, Fiction

books.title: The Window
books.author: Fahime Rahimi
books.description: A romantic story of love, growth, and a bond that changes a young life. A heartfelt novel about emotional awakening, relationships, and the experiences that shape one’s journey into adulthood.

books.title: V for Vendetta
books.author: Alan Moore
books.description: A masked rebel rises against a corrupt regime. A powerful graphic novel where the enigmatic V challenges tyranny and inspires resistance in a dystopian society.
books.genre: Dystopian graphic novel, Political Thriller, Science Fiction

books.author: Niklas Natt och Dag
books.description: A dark crime novel set in 18th-century Stockholm about a brutal murder and the investigation that reveals corruption and injustice.
books.genre: Historical crime, Thriller, Mystery, Noir, Historical fiction, Crime fiction
